title: The stupidest ideas from PMC subscribers
description: I add the stupidest ideas from PMC subscribers!
body:
Hello!
In this mod i give stupidest ideas for minecraft 1.20.1 forge!

NOW ADDED:
- ﻿Chrzan from A_chrzan_to_zycie737PL
- Me and orange slime (texture by AdostMroczej13) from Ender Sparkle

IN FUTURE
- Die wooden log and drunk villager from Ona_33
- Stick witch knoockback 255 from Nullus_XLII
- THE MAGNIFICIENT STICK from Oscilllate
- EATING DOGS from MyJemyPsy
- uh plane by arandomcat04 (hate you)
- crossbow shoting dirt&diamond blocks&eggs i think JagdpantherKing131
- explosove bazooka egg from Nyxien
- A flying helicopter that shoots rainbow colors from EuphoriaLuna
- armor, tools and custom item from waxed lightly weathered cut copper stairs from zdehpies

YOU CAN DO YOUR OWN IDEA AT PMC!



Orange slime just at creative now sorry


[Planet Minecraft link](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/najg-upsze-pomys-y-subskrybent-w/)
